commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs current-head real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the direct-run scope; there is no narrow automated code repair to apply.; Cleared: The patch only reorders existing in-repo reply maintenance calls and updates tests; it does not change dependencies, CI, secrets, package resolution, or external code execution. (sha=0b1f72afdfc592e3023dc066063e80499cc136b8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR reorders `runReplyAgent` so memory flush runs before preflight compaction and adds a regression assertion for that order.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +5. Total +5 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible: `runReplyAgent` calls preflight compaction before memory flush while the memory docs describe a pre-compaction flush; I did not run a live long-context Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs current-head real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the direct-run scope; there is no narrow automated code repair to apply.

target.title: Run memory flush before preflight compaction
target.body:
Fixes #84695.

## Summary

- run automatic memory flush before preflight compaction in `runReplyAgent`
- keep visible memory-flush errors on the same pre-run return path before the main reply
- add regression coverage proving memory flush is invoked before preflight compaction

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** `runReplyAgent` must run the memory-flush phase before the preflight-compaction phase so durable memory has a chance to run before aggressive transcript reduction.
- **Real environment tested:** PR head `ccadfb5cbf03bd5fc7352df49b1726afff1bfa8e`, worktree `/Users/andy/openclaw-84792`, local Node `v24.15.0`, diagnostics timeline enabled via `OPENCLAW_DIAGNOSTICS=1` and `OPENCLAW_DIAGNOSTICS_TIMELINE_PATH`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Rebased the PR onto current `upstream/main`, then ran the patched `runReplyAgent` path through the direct runtime test with diagnostics timeline enabled and filtered the emitted timeline for `reply.memory_flush` and `reply.preflight_compaction` spans.

```sh
OPENCLAW_DIAGNOSTICS=1 \
OPENCLAW_DIAGNOSTICS_TIMELINE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-84792-current-head-timeline.jsonl \
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts -- \
  -t 'resolves direct reply runs before early helpers read config'
```

- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal capture from the command above:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "head": "ccadfb5cbf03bd5fc7352df49b1726afff1bfa8e",
  "timelinePath": "/tmp/openclaw-84792-current-head-timeline.jsonl",
  "phaseStartOrder": [
    "reply.memory_flush",
    "reply.preflight_compaction"
  ],
  "relevantEvents": [
    {
      "type": "span.start",
      "name": "reply.memory_flush",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-06-03T08:14:42.702Z",
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "span.end",
      "name": "reply.memory_flush",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-06-03T08:14:42.702Z",
      "durationMs": 0.623,
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "span.start",
      "name": "reply.preflight_compaction",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-06-03T08:14:42.703Z",
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "span.error",
      "name": "reply.preflight_compaction",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-06-03T08:14:42.703Z",
      "durationMs": 0.185,
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix: the diagnostics timeline for the current PR head starts `reply.memory_flush` before `reply.preflight_compaction`, proving the pre-run maintenance order is now flush first, then compaction.

What was not tested: no external provider turn was executed; the proof intentionally stops at the preflight compaction sentinel after exercising the real `runReplyAgent` pre-run maintenance path.

## Supplemental validation

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-state.test.ts
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  86 passed (86)

pnpm check:test-types
# passed

pnpm lint
# passed

pnpm run format:check -- src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts
# All matched files use the correct format.

git diff --check
# clean
```
